user.title: Pumperly Instance
user.description: Enter the URL of your Pumperly instance. Use {public_url} for the public instance.

location.title: Location
location.description: Select the location to search for fuel stations around.

fuel_types.title: Fuel Types
fuel_types.description: Select the fuel types you want to track prices for.

radius.title: Search Radius
radius.description: How far to search for stations (in kilometers).

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Pumperly instance. Check the URL and try again.
error.no_fuel_types: Select at least one fuel type.

abort.already_configured: This Pumperly location is already configured.
